hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "secret guard: jq not found — failing closed." >&2; exit 2; }; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); fl=$(printf '%s' "$f" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); case "$fl" in */.env.example|*/.env.sample|*/.env.template) ;; */.env|*/.env.*|*/.streamlit/secrets.toml|*/uv.lock) echo "Blocked: $f is a protected secret/lock file — edit it manually outside Claude Code." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) [ -z "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; uv run ruff check --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; uv run ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) [ -z "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; out=$(uv run ty check 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.py|*.toml|*/.claude/settings.json) mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude" && touch "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.tests-needed" ;; esac; exit 0

[ "$(jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ] && exit 0; s="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.tests-needed"; [ -f "$s" ] || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; out=$(uv run pytest -q 2>&1) || { echo "Tests are failing — fix before finishing:" >&2; echo "$out" | tail -n 40 >&2; exit 2; }; rm -f "$s"; exit 0
